entry.title: Curriculum Vitae
entry.content:
Positions

Master@IBM - Customer Success Management (CSM)

date_range Jan 2023

location_on Berlin, Germany

apartment IBM

As a student at Master@IBM (CSM), I continue my research in the field of data mesh and build expertise in the overarching topic of data governance.

Collaborating Student Researcher

date_range Oct 2022 — Jan 2023

location_on Berlin, Germany

apartment IBM

As a student researcher at KSRI@KIT x IBM I worked in a joined research project exploring how the theoretical foundations of data mesh are applied in practice.

Collaborating Student Researcher

date_range Oct 2022 — Jan 2023

location_on Berlin, Germany

apartment KSRI@KIT

Student Researcher

date_range Mar 2022 — Sep 2022

location_on Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany

apartment KSRI@KIT

As a student researcher, I am part of the interdisciplinary team of bi.smart. Bi.smart is a research project that develops innovative tools for manufacturing companies, particularly SMEs, to support the integrated development of smart products and data-based services. Furthermore, I did research in the domain of data sharing.

Bachelor's Thesis

date_range Apr 2021 — Sep 2021

location_on Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland

apartment CAS Software AG

Bachelor thesis in cooperation with CAS Software AG and Karlsruhe Service Research Institute at KIT with the title "Towards Designing Explainable Constraint-based Expert Systems". The thesis is available on Zenodo (https://zenodo.org/record/5634105)

Student Teaching Assistant - Mathematics I

date_range Oct 2020 — Apr 2021

location_on Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany

apartment University of Karlsruhe

Student teaching assistants assist the lecture "Mathematics I" by conducting two weekly seminars for over 30 undergraduate students each, to deepen the knowledge they obtained in the lecture. During these tutorials, I recapitulated learned contents and showed them how to apply learned theorems in exercises.

Project Development in Real Estate | Internship

date_range Feb 2018 — Apr 2018

location_on Hamburg, Hamburg, Germany

apartment NORD PROJECT GBI Beteiligungsgesellschaft mbH

As an intern for NORD PROJECT Immobilien - associated with GBI AG one of the most important real estate developers in Germany, I supported the management and employees in various areas including, acquisition, market research, project management, and project development.

Consulting and Renewables | Internship

date_range Nov 2017 — Dec 2017

location_on Seville, Andalusia, Spain

apartment Grupotec Renovables

At Grupotec Renewables and Consulting Services, I mostly assisted in customer acquisition and the creation of reports for real estate. The internship was part of the ESF-funded program Integration through Exchange by Network Event Berlin. In addition to the internship, the program includes an intense preparation and follow-up period, as well as a language course.

Education

Master of Science - MS

date_range Oct 2022 — Oct 2024

location_on Technische Universität Berlin

Overseas

date_range Aug 2023 — Dec 2023

location_on Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México

Summer School

date_range Aug 2022 — Aug 2022

location_on Kyrgyz-German Institute of Applied Informatics

Summer School program in Bishkek, Kyrgyztan. Funded by the German Academic Exchange Service (DAAD).

Bachelor of Science - BS

date_range Oct 2018 — 2022

location_on Karlsruher Institut für Technologie (KIT)

The degree of Industrial Engineering and Management at KIT allows students a high degree of flexibility. After one and a half years of foundational studies, I specialized in Information Systems Management.

Erasmus+

date_range Sep 2021 — Feb 2022

location_on Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya

Erasmus+ student at the faculty of informatics at UPC for one semester

High School Diploma

date_range 2010 — 2017

location_on Sophie-Scholl-Schule

Advanced courses: Mathematics and Geography

Participation in China-exchange program with the Jiaodafuzhong middle school in Beijing and the Spain-exchange program with the Colegio Alemán de Sevilla.

Overseas

date_range 2014 — 2014

location_on Ōtaki College, Ōtaki, New Zealand

Certifications

TOEFL iBT® (C1|107)

date_range Nov 2021 — Nov 2023

apartment ETS Global B.V.

Honors

Wissen+Kompetenzen Scholarship

date_range Oct 2019

e-fellows.net online Scholarship

date_range Aug 2019

Huawei Scholarship

date_range Oct 2021

Huawei awards the scholarship to outstanding students in the fields of Computer Science and Industrial Engineering and Management during their last year of study.

DAAD Scholarship

date_range Aug 2022

Publications

Explainable AI for Constraint-Based Expert Systems

date_range Feb 22, 2022

library_books Wirtschaftsinformatik 2022 Proceedings

The need to derive explanations from machine learning (ML)-based AI systems has been addressed in recent research due to the opaqueness of their processing. However, a significant amount of productive AI systems are not based on ML but are expert systems including strong opaqueness. A resulting lack of understanding causes massive inefficiencies in business processes that involve opaque expert systems. This work uses recent research interest in explainable AI (XAI) to generate knowledge for the design of explanations in constraint-based expert systems. Following the Design Science Research paradigm, we develop design requirements and design principles. Subsequently, we design an artifact and evaluate the artifact in two experiments. We observe the following phenomena. First, global explanations in a textual format were well-received. Second, abstract local explanations improved comprehensibility. Third, contrastive explanations successfully assisted in the resolution of contradictions. Finally, a local tree-based explanation was perceived as challenging to understand.

Languages

  • English: Full professional proficiency
  • Spanish: Professional working proficiency
  • German: Native or bilingual proficiency
  • Catalan: Elementary proficiency

Test Scores

Towards Designing Explainable Constraint-based Expert Systems

date_range Sep 2021

workspace_premium 1.0
